pillar_metadata.name: Attraction
pillar_metadata.description: Guides behavior without force by creating movement gradients toward goals or resources.

behavioral_pull.impact: Determines the 'internal goal' trajectory for the unit.

investment_draw.impact: Drives the allocation of resources and capital toward high-pull units.

interaction_matrix.Attraction + Cohesion: Cluster growth; formation of teams, departments, or colonies.
interaction_matrix.Attraction + Force: Targeted execution; energy is applied specifically toward the goal.
interaction_matrix.Attraction + Harm: Obsessive behavior or addiction failure modes where the pull leads to damage.

apathy.result: Stagnation; the unit has no directional drive and moves randomly.

obsession_loop.result: Destructive pursuit; the unit continues toward a goal that is actively causing harm.
